Title: Legislation Document
Official Title: 
Number of Sections: 1
Source: versions - HA 1 to HB 472
Media Type: text/html

================================================================================

Section 1:
Legislation Document SPONSOR: Rep.Â Bush HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES 153rd GENERAL ASSEMBLY HOUSE AMENDMENT NO. 1 TO HOUSE BILL NO. 472 AMEND House Bill No. 472 by deleting lines 1 through 288 and inserting in lieu thereof the following: â Section 1. Notwithstanding the Charter of the Town of Cheswold or the requirements in the Charter, the ordinances or agreements of the Town of Cheswold, Â§ 105 of Title 22 of the Delaware Code, or any other law of this State to the contrary, the following parcels of real property, which were annexed by the Town of Cheswold on November 2, 2015, are removed from the territorial limits of the Town of Cheswold: 3-03-05602-01-2600-000 3-03-05602-01-2700-000 3-03-05602-01-2800-000 3-03-05602-01-3000-000 3-03-05602-01-3100-000 3-03-05602-01-3200-000 3-03-05602-03-1600-000 3-03-05602-03-1500-000 3-03-05602-03-1400-000 3-03-05602-03-1300-000 3-03-05602-03-1200-000 3-03-05602-03-1100-000 3-03-05602-03-1000-000 3-03-05602-03-0900-000 3-03-05602-03-0800-000 3-03-05602-03-0700-000 3-03-05602-03-0600-000 3-03-05602-03-0500-000 3-03-05602-03-0400-000 3-03-05602-03-0300-000 3-03-05602-03-0200-000 3-03-05602-03-0100-000 3-03-05602-02-8700-000 3-03-05602-02-8600-000 3-03-05602-02-8500-000 3-03-05602-02-8400-000 3-03-05602-02-8300-000 3-03-05602-02-8200-000 3-03-05602-02-8100-000 3-03-05602-02-8000-000 3-03-05602-02-7900-000 3-03-05602-02-9400-000 3-03-05602-02-9500-000 3-03-05602-02-9600-000 3-03-05602-02-9700-000 3-03-05602-02-9800-000 3-03-05602-02-9900-000 3-03-05602-02-8800-000 3-03-05602-02-8900-000 3-03-05602-02-9000-000 3-03-05602-02-9100-000 3-03-05602-02-9200-000 3-03-05602-02-9300-000 3-03-05602-02-7800-000 3-03-05602-02-4600-000 3-03-05602-02-4500-000 3-03-05602-02-4400-000 3-03-05602-02-4300-000 3-03-05602-02-4200-000 3-03-05602-02-4000-000 3-03-05602-02-4700-000 3-03-05602-02-5300-000 3-03-05602-02-5400-000 3-03-05602-02-5500-000 3-03-05602-02-5600-000 3-03-05602-02-4100-000 3-03-05602-02-5100-000 3-03-05602-01-8400-000 3-03-05602-01-8300-000 3-03-05602-01-8500-000 3-03-05602-01-9600-000 3-03-05602-01-9700-000 3-03-05602-01-9800-000 3-03-05602-03-1800-000 3-03-05602-01-9900-000 3-03-05602-05-9700-000 3-03-05602-04-9800-000 3-03-05602-04-9900-000 3-03-05602-05-9900-000 3-03-05602-06-1900-000 3-03-05602-05-9800-000 3-03-05602-06-1800-000 3-03-05602-06-1700-000 3-03-05602-06-1600-000 3-03-05602-06-1500-000 3-03-05602-06-1400-000 3-03-05602-05-9600-000 3-03-05602-05-9500-000 3-03-05602-05-9400-000 3-03-05602-05-9300-000 3-03-05602-05-9200-000 3-03-05602-05-9100-000 3-03-05602-05-9000-000 3-03-05602-05-8900-000 3-03-05602-05-8700-000 3-03-05602-05-8800-000 3-03-05602-05-8600-000 3-03-05602-05-8500-000 3-03-05602-05-8400-000 3-03-05602-05-8300-000 3-03-05602-05-8200-000 3-03-05602-05-8100-000 3-03-05602-05-8000-000 3-03-05602-05-7900-000 3-03-05602-05-7800-000 3-03-05602-05-7700-000 3-03-05602-05-7600-000 3-03-05602-05-7500-000 3-03-05602-05-7400-000 3-03-05602-05-7300-000 3-03-05602-05-7200-000 3-03-05602-05-7100-000 3-03-05602-05-7000-000 3-03-05602-05-6900-000 3-03-05602-05-6800-000 3-03-05602-05-6700-000 3-03-05602-05-3300-000 3-03-05602-05-3200-000 3-03-05602-05-3100-000 3-03-05602-05-3000-000 3-03-05602-05-2900-000 3-03-05602-05-2800-000 3-03-05602-04-1500-000 3-03-05602-04-1400-000 3-03-05602-04-1300-000 3-03-05602-04-1200-000 3-03-05602-04-1100-000 3-03-05602-04-1000-000 3-03-05602-04-0900-000 3-03-05602-04-0800-000 3-03-05602-04-0700-000 3-03-05602-06-1300-000 3-03-05602-06-1200-000 3-03-05602-06-1100-000 3-03-05602-06-1000-000 3-03-05602-06-0900-000 3-03-05602-06-0800-000 3-03-05602-06-0700-000 3-03-05602-05-1700-000 3-03-05602-05-1800-000 3-03-05602-05-l900-000 3-03-05602-05-2000-000 3-03-05602-05-2100-000 3-03-05602-05-2200-000 3-03-05602-05-2300-000 3-03-05602-05-2400-000 3-03-05602-05-2500-000 3-03-05602-05-2600-000 3-03-05602-05-2700-000 3-03-05602-05-0500-000 3-03-05602-05-0600-000 3-03-05602-05-4900-000 3-03-05602-05-5000-000 3-03-05602-05-5100-000 3-03-05602-05-5200-000 3-03-05602-05-5300-000 3-03-05602-05-5400-000 3-03-05602-05-5500-000 3-03-05602-05-5600-000 3-03-05602-05-5700-000 3-03-05602-05-5800-000 3-03-05602-05-5900-000 3-03-05602-05-6000-000 3-03-05602-05-6100-000 3-03-05602-05-6200-000 3-03-05602-05-6300-000 3-03-05602-05-6400-000 3-03-05602-05-6500-000 3-03-05602-05-6600-000 3-03-05602-05-3400-000 3-03-05602-05-3500-000 3-03-05602-05-3600-000 3-03-05602-05-3700-000 3-03-05602-05-3800-000 3-03-05602-05-3900-000 3-03-05602-05-4000-000 3-03-05602-05-4100-000 3-03-05602-05-4200-000 3-03-05602-05-4300-000 3-03-05602-05-4400-000 3-03-05602-05-4500-000 3-03-05602-05-4600-000 3-03-05602-05-4700-000 3-03-05602-05-4800-000 3-03-05602-04-6300-000 3-03-05602-04-6400-000 3-03-05602-04-6500-000 3-03-05602-04-6600-000 3-03-05602-04-6700-000 3-03-05602-04-6800-000 3-03-05602-04-6900-000 3-03-05602-04-7000-000 3-03-05602-04-7100-000 3-03-05602-04-7200-000 3-03-05602-04-7300-000 3-03-05602-04-7400-000 3-03-05602-04-7500-000 3-03-05602-04-7600-000 3-03-05602-04-7700-000 3-03-05602-04-7800-000 3-03-05602-04-7900-000 3-03-05602-04-8000-000 3-03-05602-04-8100-000 3-03-05602-04-8200-000 3-03-05602-04-8300-000 3-03-05602-04-8400-000 3-03-05602-04-8500-000 3-03-05602-04-8600-000 3-03-05602-04-8700-000 3-03-05602-04-8800-000 3-03-05602-04-8900-000 3-03-05602-04-9000-000 3-03-05602-04-9100-000 3-03-05602-04-9200-000 3-03-05602-04-9300-000 3-03-05602-04-9400-000 3-03-05602-04-9500-000 3-03-05602-04-9600-000 3-03-05602-04-9700-000 3-03-05602-05-0100-000 3-03-05602-05-0200-000 3-03-05602-05-0300-000 3-03-05602-05-0400-000 3-03-05602-04-1900-000 3-03-05602-04-2000-000 3-03-05602-04-2100-000 3-03-05602-04-2200-000 3-03-05602-04-2300-000 3-03-05602-04-2400-000 3-03-05602-04-2500-000 3-03-05602-04-2600-000 3-03-05602-04-2700-000 3-03-05602-04-2800-000 3-03-05602-04-2900-000 3-03-05602-04-3000-000 3-03-05602-04-3100-000 3-03-05602-04-3200-000 3-03-05602-04-3300-000 3-03-05602-04-0600-000 3-03-05602-04-0500-000 3-03-05602-04-0400-000 3-03-05602-04-0300-000 3-03-05602-04-0200-000 3-03-05602-04-0100-000. Section 2. On and after the effective date of this Act, the parcels of real property listed under Section 1 of this Act are subject to, and governed by, the laws applicable to other unincorporated areas of Kent County and are zoned âAR â Agricultural Residentialâ, as established under the ordinances of Kent County. Section 3. This Act takes effect on July 1, 2026.â SYNOPSIS This Amendment does all of the following: (1) Makes technical corrections to each of the parcel numbers listed in Section 1 of this Act. (2) Provides in Section 2 of this Act that, once removed from the territorial limits of the Town of Cheswold, these parcels are zoned âAR â Agricultural Residentialâ, as established under the ordinances of Kent County. (3) Provides in Section 3 of this Act that this Act takes effect on July 1, 2026. This Act requires a greater than majority vote for passage because Â§ 1 of Article IX of the Delaware Constitution requires the affirmative vote of two-thirds of the members elected to each house of the General Assembly to amend a municipal charter, whether directly, by amendment to a specific municipalityâs charter, or indirectly, by a general law.


================================================================================

Raw Text:
Legislation Document SPONSOR: Rep.Â Bush HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES 153rd GENERAL ASSEMBLY HOUSE AMENDMENT NO. 1 TO HOUSE BILL NO. 472 AMEND House Bill No. 472 by deleting lines 1 through 288 and inserting in lieu thereof the following: â Section 1. Notwithstanding the Charter of the Town of Cheswold or the requirements in the Charter, the ordinances or agreements of the Town of Cheswold, Â§ 105 of Title 22 of the Delaware Code, or any other law of this State to the contrary, the following parcels of real property, which were annexed by the Town of Cheswold on November 2, 2015, are removed from the territorial limits of the Town of Cheswold: 3-03-05602-03-1400-000 3-03-05602-03-1300-000 3-03-05602-03-1200-000 3-03-05602-03-1100-000 3-03-05602-03-1000-000 3-03-05602-03-0900-000 3-03-05602-03-0800-000 3-03-05602-03-0700-000 3-03-05602-03-0600-000 3-03-05602-03-0500-000 3-03-05602-03-0400-000 3-03-05602-03-0300-000 3-03-05602-03-0200-000 3-03-05602-03-0100-000 3-03-05602-02-8700-000 3-03-05602-02-8600-000 3-03-05602-04-9700-000 3-03-05602-05-0100-000 3-03-05602-05-0200-000 3-03-05602-05-0300-000 3-03-05602-05-0400-000 3-03-05602-04-1900-000 3-03-05602-04-2000-000 3-03-05602-04-2100-000 3-03-05602-04-0200-000 3-03-05602-04-0100-000. Section 2. On and after the effective date of this Act, the parcels of real property listed under Section 1 of this Act are subject to, and governed by, the laws applicable to other unincorporated areas of Kent County and are zoned âAR â Agricultural Residentialâ, as established under the ordinances of Kent County. Section 3. This Act takes effect on July 1, 2026.â SYNOPSIS This Amendment does all of the following: (1) Makes technical corrections to each of the parcel numbers listed in Section 1 of this Act. (2) Provides in Section 2 of this Act that, once removed from the territorial limits of the Town of Cheswold, these parcels are zoned âAR â Agricultural Residentialâ, as established under the ordinances of Kent County. (3) Provides in Section 3 of this Act that this Act takes effect on July 1, 2026. This Act requires a greater than majority vote for passage because Â§ 1 of Article IX of the Delaware Constitution requires the affirmative vote of two-thirds of the members elected to each house of the General Assembly to amend a municipal charter, whether directly, by amendment to a specific municipalityâs charter, or indirectly, by a general law.
